criterionTypes.title: Criterion Types
criterionTypes.subtitle: Manage your classification criteria and their evaluation logic

caution.title: Use {fieldName} and {evaluationLogic} with caution
caution.description: These fields have a direct impact on AI results and classification accuracy. Please use clear, descriptive English terms to ensure optimal model understanding.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Filter by field name or logic description...

delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete {count, plural, one {# selected criterion type} other {# selected criterion types}}.

form.placeholderFieldName: Affects AI results — enter a clear, English field name (e.g., Customer Satisfaction).
form.placeholderEvaluation: Affects AI results — describe in English how to evaluate this field.
form.createDescription: Add a new classification criterion with its logic and examples.
form.editDescription: Update the criterion's evaluation logic and examples.

cfp.title: Call for Proposals
cfp.subtitle: Manage and track funding opportunities
cfp.notFoundDetails: The Call For Proposal you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

info.title: Review and validate the Call For Proposal classification. Changes are saved automatically.
info.description: This page lets you review the automatically generated classification for this Call for Proposal. Mark each field as Correct if it’s accurate, and add comments whenever clarification or adjustments are needed. All changes are saved automatically, so you can safely navigate away once your review is complete.

deadline.daysLeft: {count, plural, one {# Day Left} other {# Days Left}}

actions.editCfpDescription: Manually update contents of Proposal Classification. Changes will be lost on reclassification.
actions.tagsInputPlaceholder: Type a new entry and press Enter

deleteDialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete {count, plural, one {# selected row} other {# selected rows}}.

toasts.deleteError: An error occurred while deleting the row. Please try again.
toasts.addSuccess: Classification request sent successfully. Refresh the page in few minutes to see the results.
toasts.addError: Failed to add a new entry.
toasts.reclassifySuccess: Reclassification request sent successfully. Check in few minutes for results.

addCfp.title: Add new Call for Proposal
addCfp.description: Add data to manually classify a Call for Proposal. Either manually paste your content or add attachments.

reclassifyCfp.title: Reclassify
reclassifyCfp.description: Add new attachments and reclassify the CfP.

caution.title: Manually entered data will be lost
caution.description: All attachments will be sent to be classified again. All changes done manually by editing the proposal will be lost and overwritten.

overview.title: Title
overview.shortSummaryDescription: Key details about this Call for Proposal.

additionalInfo.title: Additional Information
additionalInfo.description: More details about this Call for Proposal.

criteria.title: Criteria(s)
criteria.description: Key criteria(s) for this Call for Proposal.

fundingRestrictions.title: Funding Restrictions
fundingRestrictions.description: Any restrictions on the use of funds for this call for proposals.

eligibleActivities.title: Eligible Activities
eligibleActivities.description: Types of activities funded by this call for proposals.

applicationProcess.title: Application Process
applicationProcess.description: Steps to apply for this call for proposals.

eligibleOrganizations.title: Eligible Organizations
eligibleOrganizations.description: Types of organizations that can apply.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: Relevant documents for this call for proposals.
attachments.name: Name

overview.iloNotEligible: ILO is not eligible to apply

focalPerson.label: ILO Partnerships Focal Person
focalPerson.text: Before applying, please double-check eligibility with

developmentCooperationDashboard.label: ILO Development Cooperation Dashboard
developmentCooperationDashboard.text: Find out more about the organization and existing collaborations.

edit.title: Edit
edit.description: Manually update contents of Proposal Classification. Changes will be lost on reclassification.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.description: I know all about the CfP you are viewing. Ask me anything!
chat.placeholder: Type your question here, e.g. 'What is the deadline for the submission?'

questions.q1: CfPs aligned with the ILO’s mandate and priorities of the region/country in question?
questions.q2: What is the objective of the Call for Proposal?

questions.q1: Relation of funds vis-à-vis geographic scope of implementation?
questions.q2: What is the overhead, M&E, equipment, and other direct and indirect costs?
questions.q3: Are staff costs and core expenses viable within the criteria of the proposal? (Considering ILO staff costs can sometimes cover up to 50% of the proposal’s costs.)
questions.q4: Are co-financing or matching fund requirements feasible?

questions.q1: How transaction-heavy would the implementation be?
questions.q2: What is the role of partners?

questions.q1: What is the process of applying for this call for proposal?
questions.q2: Can I submit a project that will take place in several countries?

sources.subtitle: Manage your content sources and their guidelines

filters.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name or website URL...

delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete {count, plural, one {# selected source} other {# selected sources}}.

form.name: Name
form.placeholderGuidelines: Enter content guidelines for this source...

form.editDescription: Update the source information and guidelines.
form.invalidJson: Invalid JSON format. Please correct syntax before saving.
form.scrappingTriggerDescription: Manually trigger scrapping for this source outside of the scheduled frequency.
form.advancedConfigDescription: Build your scraping workflow by adding and configuring steps.

content-selector.label: Content Selector
content-selector.placeholder: CSS selector targeting page content, e.g. div.content, article.main

item-selector.label: Item Selector
item-selector.placeholder: CSS selector for items to iterate, e.g. div.item, ul > li

next-page-selector.label: Next Page Selector
next-page-selector.placeholder: CSS selector for the 'Next Page' button or link

scrap-attachments.label: Scrape Attachments
scrap-attachments.placeholder: True or false — whether to download linked attachments

throttle-ms.label: Throttle (ms)
throttle-ms.placeholder: Delay between requests in milliseconds, e.g. 10000

max-depth.label: Max Depth
max-depth.placeholder: Maximum depth for crawler recursion, e.g. 3

page-text-query.label: Page Text Query
page-text-query.placeholder: Keyword(s) to match within the page content

page-score-threshold.label: Page Score Threshold
page-score-threshold.placeholder: Minimal match score (0.0–1.0) for page matching

url-text-query.label: URL Text Query
url-text-query.placeholder: Keyword(s) to match within URLs during crawling

url-score-threshold.label: URL Score Threshold
url-score-threshold.placeholder: Minimal match score (0.0–1.0) for URL matching

follow-links.label: Follow Links
follow-links.placeholder: True or false — whether to follow internal links

form.toggleDesc: Toggle depending on whether this option should be enabled.
form.noConfigRequired: This operation requires no additional configuration.

delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?

classify.title: Classify Selected Results
classify.description: Are you sure you want to classify {count, plural, one {# selected result} other {# selected results}}? This action will mark them as "Manually Classified".

reject.title: Reject Selected Results
reject.description: Are you sure you want to reject {count, plural, one {# selected result} other {# selected results}}? This action will mark them as "Rejected".
